objective:

Create file governance/tests/run_lifecycle_transition_tests.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path
import sys

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path.cwd()))
from governance.runners.contour_lifecycle_runner import advance


def run():
    results = []
    worker = json.loads(Path("governance/tests/fixtures/contour_lifecycle_state_worker_execution.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    ok_transition = advance(worker, "auditor_postcheck")
    results.append({"test":"worker_to_auditor_postcheck_allowed","ok": ok_transition.get("ok") is True, "result": ok_transition})
    postcheck = json.loads(Path("governance/tests/fixtures/contour_lifecycle_state_auditor_postcheck.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    missing_proof = advance(postcheck, "completed")
    results.append({"test":"completed_requires_proof","ok": missing_proof.get("ok") is False, "result": missing_proof})
    with_proof = advance(postcheck, "completed", proof="fixture_proof_not_release")
    results.append({"test":"completed_with_proof_allowed","ok": with_proof.get("ok") is True, "result": with_proof})
    return {"ok": all(item["ok"] for item in results), "release_pass": False, "results": results}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    result = run()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    raise SystemExit(0 if result.get("ok") else 1)
